how does she work? i got e3 wod 1 but dont know how to activate her passives
you use annihilation or wait for ultra turn before exalt

when u use her 1 cost u generate a card that costs 0
each of those 0 cost that u use u gain a thread
it looks like a ball of yarn look under ur hp bar to see it
u can do it until you have max 5 stacks
now to activate her passives u need to either have annihilated a card or be in an ultra round before using her exalt 
after exalt u play ur other teammate's cards and it uses one thread per card to activate that passive

what do you MEAN waiting until turn 7 to combo off let him do something about it
I feel like poison and bleed anything that does DOT is going to be king in this rng game mode.
There isn't enough cost effective heals to offset the damage done
i dont know about that theres usually at least 1 or 2 WoD that can cleanse or a character or two that can cleanse

That's effective if you're lucky enough so that they can't draw any debuff cleanse until the 4th turn.

Or if you don't meet any "I'll kill you in one turn so your poison/bleed is useless next turn"

What I'm basically saying is.. dot sucks unless you pair it with crippling debuffs like void, petrify, stagnation, entwine, or discard so they can't kill you yet/cleanse immediately OR you kill their source of debuff cleanse.. and yeah that requires way too much rng
